title: QuakeWater
description: A resourcepack that adds Quake-like water & lava!
body:
The liquids in quake are really mesmerizing, the simple warping technique has held the test of time and caught my interest.

Now you too can get mesmerized while fishing or distracted off into lava!


## Older Minecraft Versions

While this project is marked for versions at and above 1.20, it can be used as far back as 1.13. Minecraft will simply complain that the resourcepack is made for a newer version, it'll work fine.
